caption: A woman with dark curly hair, wearing black headphones and a dark green t-shirt with a red and white circular graphic on the chest, sits before a professional microphone. She is positioned in a studio setting against a white wall and a black backdrop. The backdrop features a photo of a person's hands and the text "BESS TALK 101", "It's A Unique Hustle", and "About It!". A smaller logo in the lower left corner of the scene also reads "BESS TALK 101". As the sequence progresses, the woman looks toward someone off-screen to her right, shifting her facial expression from a neutral, listening gaze to one of active speaking, with her mouth slightly open. The camera remains stationary, capturing her from the chest up as she interacts with an unseen guest or host.
